categories.label: Dragon Guild Markers
categories.description: Points from player markers placed on the Dragon Guild tile

categories.label: Printed Dragon VP
categories.description: Sum of printed VP values on all visible dragons on your player mat

categories.label: Eggs
categories.description: 1 point per egg on dragons and player mat nests

categories.label: Cached Resources
categories.description: 1 point per resource token cached on dragons

categories.label: Tucked Cards
categories.description: 1 point per dragon card tucked under other dragons

categories.label: Public Objectives
categories.description: Points from the 4 end-of-round objective tiles

categories.label: Remaining Items
categories.description: 1 point per 4 remaining items (resources, dragons, cave cards in hand), round down
